title: The discrete second moment of mixed derivatives of the Riemann zeta function
author_string: Benjamin Durkan, Christopher Hughes, Andrew Pearce-Crump
abstract: We establish the full asymptotic for the discrete second moment of the Riemann zeta function of mixed derivatives evaluated at the zeta zeros, providing both unconditional and conditional error terms. This was first studied by Gonek, where only the leading order asymptotic was given, later extended by Conrey--Snaith and Milinovich to include the lower order terms for the first derivative. We extend the case of the first derivative to all derivatives.
